gments Diva is a collaborative project between members of the Ptolemy and JavaTime groups in the EECS department at UC Berkeley, led (respectively) by Professors Edward A. Lee and A. Richard Newton . The Ptolemy project is sponsored by the Defense

. The Ptolemy project is sponsored by the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agencies (DARPA), the United States Air Force (Rome Labs), the State of California MICRO Program, and the following companies: the Alta Group of Cadence Design Systems, He

ject is sponsored by the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agencies (DARPA) grant DABT63-95-C-0074-NEWTON-06/96, Hewlett Packard and Hughes Research Laboratories. We're also glad to acknowledge the assistance of the following people: Design and cod
